source_claim: MIRA detects prior and noise-model misspecification on 64x64x3 galaxy images with L=16 fiducial samples.

machine_checkable_contract.data: The five author-released tensors at pinned commit 3bc229222cbcf72bd470267175d9a6dff6689ce0 must match protected SHA-256 values.
machine_checkable_contract.numeric_reference_rule: Report absolute differences from the hardcoded plot scores. Exact score parity is not an acceptance condition because the source claim is detection/ranking and the paper omits its RNG and MIRA center configuration.
machine_checkable_contract.normalization: False: the released mira API default; the paper does not report overriding it
machine_checkable_contract.uncertainty_rule: Each paired 95% two-axis bootstrap interval for true minus misspecified score must exclude zero.
machine_checkable_contract.negative_control_rule: Rolling truth-to-observation pairing by one must lower the true-model score.
machine_checkable_contract.released_code_parity_rule: At full L, N, and dimension, the optimized scorer must agree with one released-code region to within one discrete count quantum.
